synthetic_compare.ga_definition: GA searches the synthetic engineering model for worse communication scenes.
synthetic_compare.gan_definition: GAN learns from GA elite samples and generates nearby high-risk scenarios.
synthetic_compare.random_definition: Random uses the same variable bounds without optimization.

measured_map_compare.rule: Public open data are treated as measured communication fields, not as complete explicit BS/interferer/building truth maps.

optional_source_policy.paper_mainline: Only defended source classes are enabled by default.

optional_profiles.optional_all_controlled: Enable 4/5/6 as optional controlled-source classes without asserting background PPP prevalence.
optional_profiles.optional_gnss_controlled: Enable class 4 only as optional controlled source.
optional_profiles.optional_industrial_controlled: Enable class 5 only as optional controlled source.
optional_profiles.optional_satellite_controlled: Enable class 6 only as optional controlled source.
